content: Phase 2: V1 Lab - 6 strategies + warehouse v2 + multi-pane charts + checklist + journal (tested 97.5%)
Phase 2.5: NumberSliderInput, date window, exports, load past run, journal filter+bulk delete
Phase 3: Auto-Optimizer (Optuna TPE + Grid + CMA-ES + heatmap + robustness + importance) tested 100%
Phase 3.5: Progress bar fix + preset usability + Stop button + auto-save best as backtest + 3 exports
Phase 7: Local Docker Compose package - docker-compose.yml, Dockerfiles, nginx.conf, start.sh/.bat, .env.example files
Documentation: 7 comprehensive docs (README, ARCHITECTURE, HANDOFF, DEVELOPMENT_JOURNEY, STRATEGY_PLUGINS, API_REFERENCE, LOCAL_SETUP) + CHANGELOG + plan.md updated
GitHub push: support agent provided step-by-step instructions
Phase 4: Upstox OAuth + WS tick stream + Live Signal Console + OPTIONS BACKTEST - documented thoroughly in HANDOFF.md; needs dedicated session
Phase 5: Probabilistic exit engine + meta-model + position sizing + event filter + VIX overlay + Telegram
